channel.title: AstroDeck Blog
channel.description: Articles, tutorials, and updates from the AstroDeck project

item.title: Unicorn Raises $50M in Series A, Turns Out to Be an Actual Unicorn
item.description: Silicon Valley investors embarrassed after discovering their hottest investment is literally a horse with a horn
item.author: TechCritter Weekly

item.title: Kraken Becomes City's Most Requested Plumber, 8 Arms 'A Game Changer'
item.description: Sea monster's ability to fix 8 leaks simultaneously earns 5-star reviews across the tristate area
item.author: Maritime Trades Journal

item.title: Ghost Fired From Remote Job for 'Being Too Transparent'
item.description: Paranormal employee discovers corporate culture doesn't appreciate literal honesty
item.author: Workplace Paranormal Report

item.title: Centaur Dominates Food Delivery Apps, Claims 'No Bike Needed'
item.description: Half-horse courier averages 47 deliveries per hour, refuses to wear the branded backpack
item.author: Gig Economy Gazette

item.title: Medusa Opens Hair Salon, Promises 'Looks That Will Petrify You'
item.description: Gorgon's new salon offers the most permanent hairstyles in the industry — literally
item.author: Mythical Beauty Review

item.title: Yeti Hired as Ski Instructor, Guests Describe Experience as 'Chilling'
item.description: Alpine resort's newest employee claims 200,000 years of mountain experience
item.author: Winter Sports Paranormal

item.title: Dragon Receives 47 HOA Violations, Burns Down Mailbox in Response
item.description: Ancient beast discovers suburban living is more terrifying than knights ever were
item.author: Suburban Dragons Weekly

item.title: Predator & Alien Open Galaxy's First Intergalactic Grocery Store
item.description: Two unlikely business partners bring fresh produce and existential dread to your neighborhood shopping experience
item.author: Cosmic Commerce Reporter

item.title: Bigfoot Becomes Instagram Influencer, Still Nobody Believes He's Real
item.description: Cryptid's million-follower account dismissed as 'really good CGI'
item.author: Cryptid Social Media Digest

item.title: Zombie Gets Promoted to Middle Management, Nobody Notices the Difference
item.description: Undead employee seamlessly integrates into corporate culture through strategic groaning
item.author: Corporate Undead Weekly

item.title: Ancient Mummy Applies for Museum Job, Gets Rejected for Lack of Experience
item.description: 5000-year-old artifact told they need 'at least 7000 years in customer service'
item.author: Archaeological Employment News

item.title: Local Vampire and Werewolf Open 24-Hour Coffee Shop, Immediately Regret It
item.description: Nocturnal entrepreneurs discover that running a business requires more than just being awake at night
item.author: Night Shift Chronicles

item.title: Frankenstein's Monster Joins Dating App, Profile Says 'No Drama'
item.description: Reanimated creature seeks connection, discovers modern dating is the real horror
item.author: Supernatural Singles Weekly

item.title: Wizard Calls Tech Support, Accidentally Turns Agent Into Frog
item.description: Ancient sorcerer discovers that 'Have you tried turning it off and on again' doesn't work on crystal balls
item.author: Magical IT Department

item.title: Troll Loses Bridge to City Infrastructure Project, Forced to Learn New Skills
item.description: Ancient bridge guardian discovers eminent domain is scarier than knights
item.author: Municipal Development News
